seoTitle: Lowpowersemi News | Product Releases Company Updates | BeiLuo Electronics
seoDescription: Latest news and updates from Lowpowersemi. New product releases, technology announcements, and company information.

news.title: Lowpowersemi Expands Ultra-Low Power LDO Portfolio
news.summary: Lowpowersemi announces expansion of ultra-low power LDO portfolio with new 1μA quiescent current devices for IoT applications.
content: Lowpowersemi has expanded its portfolio of ultra-low power LDO regulators with the introduction of several new devices featuring industry-leading 1μA quiescent current. These new LDOs are specifically designed for battery-powered IoT devices, wearables, and portable electronics where maximizing battery life is critical.

The new LP3990 series offers fixed output voltages from 1.2V to 3.3V, all with the same ultra-low 1μA quiescent current. These devices can deliver up to 300mA output current while maintaining excellent load and line regulation. The low 250mV dropout voltage at full load allows operation even when the battery is nearly depleted.

Key features of the new LP3990 series include current limit protection, thermal shutdown, reverse current protection, and a compact SOT-23-5 package. The devices operate over an industrial temperature range of -40°C to +85°C, making them suitable for both consumer and industrial applications.

As an authorized distributor, BeiLuo Electronics provides full technical support for these new devices including reference designs, application notes, and FAE assistance. Samples and evaluation boards are available now.

news.title: Lowpowersemi Introduces Power Path Battery Charger
news.summary: New LP4056 power path charger enables simultaneous charging and system operation for smartphones and portable devices.
content: Lowpowersemi has introduced the LP4056, a complete power path management and battery charger IC for single-cell Li-ion and Li-Polymer batteries. This highly integrated device enables simultaneous battery charging and system operation, a critical feature for modern portable electronics.

The LP4056 can deliver up to 1A charge current while supporting system loads up to 2A. When input power is available, the system operates directly from the input while charging the battery. If system load exceeds input capacity, the battery automatically supplements the power. When input is removed, the system seamlessly switches to battery power.

Key features include USB-compliant input current limits (100mA/500mA), dual charge status indicators, 7-hour safety timer, thermal regulation, and comprehensive protection features. The device is available in a compact QFN-16 package measuring only 3mm x 3mm.

The power path architecture eliminates the charge-discharge cycling that reduces battery life in traditional charging systems. This makes the LP4056 ideal for smartphones, tablets, portable media players, and other devices that are frequently used while charging.
BeiLuo Electronics provides complete design support for the LP4056 including reference designs, PCB layout guidelines, and FAE assistance. Contact us for samples and evaluation boards.

news.title: Lowpowersemi Achieves ISO 14001 Environmental Certification
news.summary: Lowpowersemi receives ISO 14001 environmental management certification, demonstrating commitment to sustainable manufacturing practices.
content: Lowpowersemi has achieved ISO 14001 certification for its environmental management system, joining the ranks of environmentally responsible semiconductor manufacturers. This certification recognizes Lowpowersemi's commitment to sustainable manufacturing practices and environmental stewardship.

The ISO 14001 certification covers all aspects of Lowpowersemi's operations including design, manufacturing, and supply chain management. Key environmental initiatives include waste reduction programs, energy efficiency improvements, and responsible material sourcing.

This certification complements Lowpowersemi's existing ISO 9001 quality management certification, demonstrating the company's comprehensive approach to both quality and environmental responsibility. Customers can be assured that Lowpowersemi products are manufactured with minimal environmental impact.

Lowpowersemi's power management ICs contribute to environmental sustainability by enabling ultra-low power consumption in end products. By helping customers extend battery life and reduce energy consumption, Lowpowersemi products support global energy efficiency goals.
BeiLuo Electronics, as an authorized distributor, supports Lowpowersemi's environmental initiatives and can provide customers with detailed environmental compliance documentation for all products.

news.title: Lowpowersemi Launches High-Efficiency DC-DC Converter Family
news.summary: New LP6235 buck converter and LP6250 boost converter deliver up to 95% efficiency for battery-powered applications.
content: Lowpowersemi has launched a new family of high-efficiency DC-DC converters including the LP6235 synchronous buck converter and LP6250 boost converter. These devices deliver up to 95% efficiency, making them ideal for extending battery life in portable electronics.

The LP6235 is a synchronous buck converter that can deliver up to 2A output current with input voltages from 2.7V to 5.5V. It features automatic PFM/PWM mode switching to maintain high efficiency across the entire load range. The fixed 1.5MHz switching frequency allows the use of small external components.

The LP6250 is a boost converter that can generate output voltages up to 5.5V from input voltages as low as 0.9V. This makes it ideal for single-cell battery applications where the output voltage must be higher than the battery voltage. The device can deliver up to 1A output current.

Both converters feature low quiescent current, comprehensive protection features, and compact SOT-23-5 packages. They are suitable for smartphones, tablets, IoT devices, portable medical equipment, and industrial applications.

BeiLuo Electronics provides comprehensive design support for these new DC-DC converters including reference designs, efficiency calculations, and PCB layout guidance. Contact our FAE team for application assistance.
